mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (content, user_num, post_id, target_type, created_at) VALUES (#{content}, #{userNum}, #{postId}, 'POST', NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.content, c.user_num AS userNum, c.post_id AS postId, u.nickname, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM comments c LEFT JOIN users u ON c.user_num = u.user_num WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
